item.title: LATIN x TECH HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026 | HUGEL, Feid, Kali Uchis, Pitbull & more
item.itunes:title: LATIN x TECH HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026 | HUGEL, Feid, Kali Uchis, Pitbull & more
item.description:
LATIN x TECH HOUSE PARTY MIX 2026 | HUGEL, Feid, Kali Uchis, Pitbull & more. High-energy Latin club edits, reggaeton heat and tech house grooves. Perfect for parties, pregame, and late-night energy. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ This mix fuses Latin club heat with tech house energy, moving from reggaeton edits to peak-time dancefloor bangers. Featuring HUGEL, Feid, Kali Uchis, Pitbull, IAmChino, SPHYNX, Kidd Keo and more — crafted for the dancefloor. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ LISTEN ON OTHER PLATFORMS YouTube https://www.youtube.com/@DJBlast-BLASTMODE Apple Podcasts https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/blast-mode/id1873949703 Bookings & Business bonnechancedigital@gmail.com ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ENERGY ELEVATED. Welcome to BLAST MODE — powered by DJ BLAST. This show delivers high-impact DJ mixes blending House, Latin, Afro, Hip-Hop, R&B, and global party energy. From smooth grooves to peak-time pressure, every mix is crafted with intention and real dancefloor momentum. New mixes every week. Like, comment and follow — and stay elevated. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ TRACKLIST
1. Party Started (Rob DVS Cha Cha Slide Edit) – HUGEL, Ochok, Je... 2. Coco Loco – Salvi, Franklin Da... 3. Sol Playa – Chuwe, Sabroson... 4. Me Robaste El Sueno (Tambora) (Jay Psar Remix) – Martina Camargo 5. CHIMBA (Intro - Dirty) – Mark Di Meo, Pens... 6. Parado No Bailao (Cavalli & Peppe Salerno Remix) – MC L Da Vinte & M... 7. Papi Chulo... Te Traigo El MMMM (Joe Rok Remix) – Lorna 8. Dracukeo (Alex Selas Remix) (Dirty) – Kidd Keo 9. Muevelo (PJAMA SAM Remix) – Kali Uchis 10. Soy Asi (Krexxton & CX Remix) (Dirty) – IAmChino, Pitbull... 11. Morenita (Myles vs Matt Sassari Club Edit) – Hugel ft. Cumbiafr... 12. Tira Camisa (DJ Mag Tokyo Drift Remix) – Furacao 2000, CA... 13. The Killer's Song (DJ Mag & DJ Mario Andretti Remix) – Carolina Marquez 14. El Evangelio (DJ Mag & DJ William Remix) – Wganda Kenya 15. NOS DESCONOXIMOS (Da Phonk Club Edit) – Feid 16. Otro Lado – SPHYNX 17. Fuego – Sico Vox 18. Dimeke – Felipe C 19. Es Ahora – Edgar Aguirre 20. Lo Que Paso – Brian Matrix 21. Dembow – Brian Matrix 22. Kalabancoro – Ginton, Richard Bona

item.title: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026 | John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean & more
item.itunes:title: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026 | John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean & more
item.description: HOUSE x DANCE PARTY MIX 2026 | John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean & more. Deep house grooves, dance anthems and pop remixes built for the dancefloor. Perfect for pregame, late nights, and festival energy. Subscribe for weekly mixes https://www.youtube.com/@DJBlast-BLASTMODE Bookings & Business bonnechancedigital@gmail.com ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ This mix blends House, Dance and pop-driven club edits, moving from deep grooves to peak-time festival anthems. Featuring John Summit, HUGEL, Dua Lipa, Rihanna, Frank Ocean, Tinashe, Fred Again-style energy and more — crafted for the dancefloor. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ LISTEN ON OTHER PLATFORMS SoundCloud https://soundcloud.com/djblast-blastmode Apple Podcasts https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/blast-mode/id1873949703 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ENERGY ELEVATED. Welcome to BLAST MODE — powered by DJ BLAST. This channel delivers high-impact DJ mixes blending House, Latin, Afro, Hip-Hop, R&B, and global party energy. From smooth grooves to peak-time pressure, every mix is crafted with intention and real dancefloor momentum. New mixes every week. Like, comment and subscribe — and stay elevated. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ MY DJ SETUP / GEAR USED This is the gear I use for my DJ mixes, practice sessions, and content creation. DJ Controller (Main) Pioneer DJ DDJ-FLX10 https://amzn.to/46YkoKf DJ Controller (Secondary) Pioneer DJ DDJ-FLX4 https://amzn.to/3NxzUGs Headphones Pioneer DJ HDJ-CUE1 https://amzn.to/4lnKQCY Studio Speakers Pioneer DJ DM-50D Active 5-inch Desktop Monitor Speaker https://amzn.to/4rxwUHT DJ Software Serato DJ Pro https://serato.com/dj/pro Laptop MacBook Pro https://amzn.to/4brzSYH ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ TRACKLIST 1. Loop – Jerri 2. I Wish (HUGEL Remix) – Stevie Wonder 3. Human (Joshwa Remix) – John Summit ft. Echoes 4. New Rules (Lincoln Baio Una Noche Con Hugel Edit) – Dua Lipa 5. Deep End – John Summit 6. Beauty Sleep (Myles Club Edit) – John Summit 7. Make Me Feel (Jus Ron Remix) – John Summit 8. Reaching Out (Hugel Remix) – Dillon Francis ft. Bow Anderson 9. Die A Little Bit (THUGLI Remix) (Dirty) – Tinashe ft. Ms Banks 10. Heathens (Khus Remix) – twenty one pilots 11. Give It More – Turquoise Music 12. Body – Topic, Fireboy DML & Nico Santos 13. Bad Dreams (HUGEL Remix) – Teddy Swims 14. Bitch Better Have My Money (5HOURS, Francesco Ken & Alessio Centra Remix) (Dirty) – Rihanna 15. Dangerous (SNEISEN Remix) (Dirty) – Kardinal Offishall ft. Akon 16. Think Of Me (Korolova Remix) – HUGEL, David Guetta, Kelani & Daecolm 17. Kalabancoro (DJcity Intro) – Ginton, Richard Bona & Salif Keita 18. Lost (EKLIPZ Remix) (Dirty) – Frank Ocean 19. Wide Awake (Dirty) – Chris Stussy ft. Tom Did It 20. Pompeii (5HOURS Remix) – Bastille 21. Cruel Summer (Sak Noel Remix) – Bananarama ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ #HouseMix #DanceMix #HousePartyMix #JohnSummit #HUGEL #DuaLipa #Rihanna #FrankOcean #DeepHouse #ClubMix2026 #FestivalHouse #DancefloorEnergy #HouseMusic2026 #DJBlast #BLASTMODE #EnergyElevated
